revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿二]][[zh:十二月廿二]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 22|qq=December 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Genki|ja|Genki (era)|1=Genki (era)|2=ja|3=元亀|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki Era|Genki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1145064}} 3rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573 AD|1=1573}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}} ) – The {{ill|Battle of Mikatagahara|en|Battle of Mikatagahara|qid=Q690464|lt=Battle of Mikatagahara|1=Battle of Mikatagahara}} . * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862 AD|1=1862}} {{ill|January 21|en|January 21|qid=Q2273|lt=January 21|1=January 21}} ) – In order to negotiate the postponement of market and port openings, a delegation of 36 members—the 1st {{ill|Diplomatic Mission to Europe|ja|遣欧使節団|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Diplomatic Mission to Europe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} led by the Foreign Affairs Magistrate {{ill|Takenouchi Yasunori|en|Takenouchi Yasunori|qid=Q6526546|lt=Takeuchi Yasunori|1=Takenouchi Yasunori}} —set sail from Nagasaki. == Births == * {{ill|Kaikō|ja|開皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaikō|1=Kaihuang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5368056}} 18th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|599|en|599|qid=Q34050|lt=599 AD|1=599}} {{ill|January 23|en|January 23|qid=Q2276|lt=January 23|1=January 23}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Taizong of Tang|en|Emperor Taizong of Tang|qid=Q9701|lt=Taizong|1=Emperor Taizong of Tang}} , the 2nd Emperor of the {{ill|Tang dynasty|en|Tang dynasty|qid=Q9683|lt=Tang Dynasty|1=Tang dynasty}} (d. {{ill|649|en|649|qid=Q31117|lt=649 AD|1=649}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1848|en|1848|qid=Q7647|lt=1848 AD|1=1848}} {{ill|January 27|en|January 27|qid=Q2284|lt=January 27|1=January 27}} ) – {{ill|Tōgō Heihachirō|en|Tōgō Heihachirō|qid=Q296785|lt=Tōgō Heihachirō|1=Tōgō Heihachirō}} , a naval officer and Commander of the Combined Fleet (d. {{ill|1934|en|1934|qid=Q18714|lt=1934 AD|1=1934}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859 AD|1=1859}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}} ) – {{ill|Kairakutei Black I|en|Kairakutei Black I|qid=Q4208718|lt=Kairakutei Black (1st generation)|1=Kairakutei Black I}} , a rakugo performer (d. {{ill|1923|en|1923|qid=Q2169|lt=1923 AD|1=1923}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869 AD|1=1869}} {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}} ) – {{ill|Kenkichi Kagami|en|Kenkichi Kagami|qid=Q11412372|lt=Kakami Kamakichi|1=Kenkichi Kagami}} , an entrepreneur (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|qid=Q18639|lt=1939 AD|1=1939}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Taihō (era)|en|Taihō (era)|qid=Q1346269|lt=Taibō (Japan)|1=Taihō (era)}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|703|en|703|qid=Q23500|lt=703 AD|1=703}} {{ill|January 13|en|January 13|qid=Q2255|lt=January 13|1=January 13}} ) – {{ill|Empress Jitō|ja|Empress Jitō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Jitō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 41st {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645 AD|1=645}} ). * {{ill|Ninju|en|Ninju|qid=Q1373077|lt=Ninju|1=Ninju}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|853|en|853|qid=Q30367|lt=853 AD|1=853}} {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}} ) – {{ill|Ono no Takamura|en|Ono no Takamura|qid=Q1139928|lt=Ono no Takamura|1=Ono no Takamura}} , a poet (born {{ill|802|en|802|qid=Q29992|lt=802 AD|1=802}} ). * {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1765|en|1765|qid=Q7665|lt=1765 AD|1=1765}} {{ill|January 13|en|January 13|qid=Q2255|lt=January 13|1=January 13}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munetada|en|Tokugawa Munetada|qid=Q3530490|lt=Tokugawa Sukenobu|1=Tokugawa Munetada}} , the first head of the {{ill|Hitotsubashi Tokugawa family|ja|一橋徳川家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitotsubashi Tokugawa family|1=Hitotsubashi House|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10863984}} (born {{ill|1721|en|1721|qid=Q6913|lt=1721 AD|1=1721}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|21|12|23|11|22|1|12|1222|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
